name: acuterium-skills-marketplace
description: Acuterium Agent Skills Marketplace — sovereign doctrines, protocols and agent skills for the Acuterium ecosystem, packaged as installable Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: acuterium-doctrines
plugins.description: Acuterium sovereign doctrines & orchestration brain: ADOCP routing, ASIP soul-infusion, BARANURION governance, PRISM, RED-TEAM 8-gate QA, MADA briefing, DAG engine, LLM-judge/matrix/negotiation, CrewAI executor, task recovery, threat/strategy/RIA/URANA engines. 19 skills.

plugins.name: acuterium-legal-ai
plugins.description: Acuterium sovereign legal AI skills (RUZN.AI) — contract review, legal research, document drafting, due diligence, e-discovery for Omani/GCC legal standards.

plugins.name: acuterium-compliance-ai
plugins.description: Acuterium compliance AI skills — compliance monitoring, regulatory-change intelligence, policy enforcement, risk assessment, compliance workflow automation.

plugins.name: acuterium-audit-ai
plugins.description: Acuterium audit AI skills — internal audit automation, automated compliance auditing, audit-trail & evidence management.

plugins.name: acuterium-quality-assurance
plugins.description: Acuterium quality-assurance skills (Ūrānā QMS) — QA framework, accreditation/attestation intelligence, CAPA narrative generation.

plugins.name: acuterium-registry-baranurion

plugins.name: acuterium-registry-erebus

plugins.name: acuterium-registry-wagha

plugins.name: acuterium-registry-commercial
